  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[channel, col_name, d_year, d_qoy, i_category], aggr=[count(*), sum(foo.ext_sales_price)]

          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([channel@0, col_name@1, d_year@2, d_qoy@3, i_category@4], 8), input_partitions=24

    GpuProjectExec: row_width=128, subtree_max_row_bytes=256
